The '''Quantum Ion Drive''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Sublight engine/Legends|engine]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="SWG:RotW" />

==Appearances==
